projects.title: Projects
projects.name: Project Name
projects.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this project?

hero.subtitle: Intelligent aerial image analysis for agriculture
hero.description: Identify vegetation, count trees, detect pests, and monitor crop health using artificial intelligence.

whatIs.title: What is Roboroça?
whatIs.p1: Roboroça is a full-featured platform for agricultural aerial image analysis. Using state-of-the-art machine learning models, it processes drone and satellite images to generate actionable insights about your property.
whatIs.p2: From pest detection to tree counting, from biomass estimation to vegetation health monitoring — everything in a single platform, accessible from any device.

features.title: Features
features.aerialDesc: Upload drone, satellite, and video files. Automatic GPS extraction and keyframe detection.
features.aiDesc: 8 ML models: vegetation, trees, pests, biomass, NDVI, and land classification.
features.gisDesc: Cultivation zones, ROI perimeter, annotations, and GeoJSON export.
features.videoDesc: Upload drone videos with automatic keyframe extraction.
features.dashboardDesc: Cross-project comparison, evolution timeline, and detailed metrics.
features.geojsonDesc: Export annotations and zones to QGIS, Google Earth, and other GIS tools.
features.i18nDesc: Available in Portuguese, English, and Spanish.
features.darkModeDesc: Adaptive interface with light and dark themes.

steps.title: How It Works
steps.uploadDesc: Upload drone, satellite, or video images.
steps.perimeterDesc: Define the area of interest on the map.
steps.analyzeDesc: AI processes the images and generates reports automatically.
steps.reportDesc: View results and export your data.

cta.title: Ready to get started?
cta.description: Create your free account and start analyzing your aerial images today.
